elements.name: the_movies_solo--early_mid-stage_symptoms--comp_question
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.

elements.text: In the real world, sometimes things don't go well. It's normal to feel some anxiety when reading about situations you worry about. It's also important to have some stories that end negatively. This helps you practice managing your anxiety!
